title: uva-ursi parryana
intro: Uva-ursi parryana, also known as Bearberry, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant contains arbutin, a compound with medicinal properties that have been used to treat urinary tract infections and inflammation due to its astringent and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Uva-ursi parryana include its ability to reduce the risk of urinary tract infections, alleviate symptoms of cystitis, and exhibit antimicrobial properties against certain bacteria. Uva-ursi parryana is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally or applied topically to the affected area.
